name: New Char Siu House
tagline: Chinatown's takeout-only roast meat institution — 4.6 stars, legendary char siu and roast duck, sold out by afternoon.
mustOrder: roast duck — crispy skin, succulent meat
parking: Metered street parking on Maunakea St
talkStory: A Chinatown institution on Maunakea St — takeout only, no seats, just a glass case of glistening roast meats and a line out the door. The char siu is deeply caramelized with that perfect balance of sweet and savory. The roast duck rivals Roast Duck Kitchen in Aiea. Opens early (7:30am) and popular items sell out by early afternoon. Point at what you want, it gets chopped and bagged. This is how Chinatown has operated for generations. Cash only.
